creator: arun@FreeBSD.org
text:
Currently, the port fails to build due to problems fetching the distfiles.

Fix: The upstream folks haven't really signed up to provide stable URLs
        yet - so this can actually come back.

        The reason why I'm upgrading the port is that the latest development
        snapshot has the FreeBSD specific changes I submitted earlier 
        integrated.
  
        Please apply the attached patch.

Update to 080207 release.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to build the port
